title: phlox diffusa var. longistylis
intro: Phlox diffusa var. longistylis, also known as Long-styled Phlox or Bearberry Phlox, is a perennial herb native to the mountains of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phlox diffusa var. longistylis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various ailments.
